query:
DELETE FROM agent_inventory 
WHERE item_id NOT IN (SELECT item_id FROM game_item_catalog) 
  AND item_id NOT IN (SELECT equip_id FROM game_equipment_catalog)

  AND item_id NOT IN (SELECT equip_id FROM game_equipment_catalog)
